'''pajaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smallbore|smallbore]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smallbore|smallbore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pajaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæjæyæth|pæjæyæth]] || [[word:pæjæyæj|pæjæyæj]] || [[word:pæjæyæsh|pæjæyæsh]] || [[word:pæjæyæ|pæjæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pajajayath|pajajayath]] || [[word:pajajayaj|pajajayaj]] || [[word:pajajayash|pajajayash]] || [[word:pajajaya|pajajaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pajayath|pajayath]] || [[word:pajayaj|pajayaj]] || [[word:pajayash|pajayash]] || [[word:pajaya|pajaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pajafyath|pajafyath]] || [[word:pajafyaj|pajafyaj]] || [[word:pajafyash|pajafyash]] || [[word:pajafyaf|pajafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pajayatha|pajayatha]] || [[word:pajayaja|pajayaja]] || [[word:pajayasha|pajayasha]] || [[word:pajayaka|pajayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pajayath|pajayath]] || [[word:pajayaj|pajayaj]] || [[word:pajayash|pajayash]] || [[word:pajaya|pajaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pajayathal|pajayathal]] || [[word:pajayajal|pajayajal]] || [[word:pajayashal|pajayashal]] || [[word:pajayakal|pajayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pajayathatha|pajayathatha]] || [[word:pajayajaja|pajayajaja]] || [[word:pajayashasha|pajayashasha]] || [[word:pajayaka|pajayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pajayathan|pajayathan]] || [[word:pajayajan|pajayajan]] || [[word:pajayashan|pajayashan]] || [[word:pajayakan|pajayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pajayathaoro|pajayathaoro]] || [[word:pajayajaoro|pajayajaoro]] || [[word:pajayashaoro|pajayashaoro]] || [[word:pajayakaoro|pajayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
